sections.paragraph:
f. (from זוּעַ with the Vav moveable.).

(1) agitation, trouble, Jer 15:4, נְתַתִּים לִזְוָעָה לְכֹל מַמְלְכֹות הָאָרֶץ “I will deliver them for trouble to all kingdoms of the earth;” 24:9 29:18 34:17 2Ch 29:8. The קרי every where [in these passages] has the form זַעֲוָה, as being of more easy utterance (which see).

(2) terror, Isa 28:19.
